Identifier:ClassDeclaration.Definition: The name of a {c:color-green bold}class{/c} declaration.{RefExt}

Identifier:ConstructorDeclaration.Definition: The name of a type {c:color-green bold}constructor{/c} declaration.{RefExt}

Identifier:ConstructorInvocation.Definition: The name of a type {c:color-green bold}constructor{/c}.{JumpExt}

Identifier:EnumDeclaration.Definition: The name of an {c:color-light-green bold}enum{/c} declaration.{RefExt}

Identifier:FieldDeclaration.Definition: The name of a {c:color-white bold}field{/c} declared within the containing type.

Identifier:FieldReference.Definition: The name of a {c:color-white bold}field{/c} declared within the containing type.

Identifier:LocalVariableDeclaration.Definition: The name of a {c:color-light-blue bold}local variable{/c} that is accessible from below the declaration statement to the end of the containing scope.

Identifier:LocalVariableReference.Definition: The name of a {c:color-light-blue bold}local varaible{/c} declared above within the containing scope.

Identifier:MethodDeclaration.Definition: The name of a {c:color-yellow bold}method{/c} name that can be invoked.{RefExt}

Identifier:MethodInvocation.Definition: The name of a {c:color-yellow bold}method{/c} being invoked.{JumpExt}

Identifier:Parameter.Definition: The name of a {c:color-light-blue bold}parameter{/c} that is accessible anywhere within the following method or constructor body.

Identifier:ParameterReference.Definition: The name of a {c:color-light-blue bold}parameter{/c} defined in the containing method or constructor {c:tt color-light-blue}signature{/c}.

Identifier:PropertyDeclaration.Definition: The name of a {c:color-white bold}property{/c} declared within the containing type.

Identifier:RecordDeclaration.Definition: The name of a {c:color-green bold}record{/c} declaration.{RefExt}

Identifier:RecordStructDeclaration.Definition: The name of a {c:color-green bold}record struct{/c} declaration.{RefExt}

Identifier:StructDeclaration.Definition: The name of a {c:color-jade bold}struct{/c} declaration.{RefExt}
